textByHashes.1f628914df1452f87a2c2de2b661e65ae3b3f097: I'm pretty much retired these days old fellow. My test piloting days are over. I'm just relaxing here and enjoying the primal clash between man and man.
textByHashes.2b87e527bd7f849d9f06c437ac2c13919d94ac89: I do find the duels entertaining to watch, but I suspect that actually being involved would be a lot less fun for me. I'm a lover, not a fighter!
textByHashes.a3e24b15edbc89214713a43446ccdc4527196ab8: Excellent. Just what I need whilst watching the duels.
textByHashes.7960a3643da49a85a87654d96296b681a62445af: Here you go, have a dashing pilot's scarf.
textByHashes.b4352906569836025467d2753a7221896c89bba5: I have some spare goggles, you might as well have them.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
